page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.ebmgn6e.24xlarge is a GPU-accelerated bare-metal instance designed for high-performance computing workloads. Powered by the KVM hypervisor, this server features 96 dedicated physical cores on an Intel Xeon 8163 processor utilizing the x86_64 architecture. With a one-to-one mapping of threads to physical cores, the instance provides predictable compute performance. It is equipped with 768 GB of system memory, translating to 8.0 GB of RAM per core.

The primary accelerator hardware consists of eight NVIDIA V100 GPUs, delivering a combined total of 256 GB of VRAM. This massive parallel processing capability is paired with a baseline network bandwidth of 32 Gbps to handle substantial data transfers. The instance does not include local storage, meaning all storage requirements must be met through network-attached block storage options.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the ecs.ebmgn6e.24xlarge represents a high-density resource allocation where the cost is justified by the dense consolidation of eight enterprise-grade GPUs and 96 dedicated CPU cores. This hardware profile is optimized for workloads such as deep learning training, complex scientific simulations, large-scale data science jobs, and high-performance parallel computing tasks that require massive GPU acceleration and substantial system memory.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.ebmgn6e.24xlarge is a high-performance, GPU-accelerated bare-metal server designed for compute-intensive workloads. It features 96 dedicated physical cores powered by Intel Xeon 8163 processors on the x86_64 architecture, with a thread-to-core ratio of 1.0. The instance is equipped with 768 GB of system memory, providing 8.0 GB of RAM per core. For acceleration, it integrates eight NVIDIA V100 GPUs with a total of 256 GB of VRAM. Network connectivity is supported by a 32 Gbps baseline bandwidth, while local storage is absent, requiring network-attached storage solutions. This configuration is engineered for parallel computing, deep learning, and large-scale data science workloads.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.ebmgn6e.24xlarge is a GPU-accelerated server featuring 96 dedicated Intel Xeon cores, 768 GB of RAM, and eight NVIDIA V100 GPUs with 256 GB of VRAM for high-performance computing.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.ebmgn6e.24xlarge features 96 dedicated Intel Xeon cores, 768 GB RAM, and 8 NVIDIA V100 GPUs for parallel computing.
tagline: A high-density GPU server featuring ninety-six dedicated cores and eight accelerators for parallel processing and deep learning workloads.
bullet_points: 96 dedicated Intel Xeon 8163 physical cores with single-thread execution.
Eight integrated NVIDIA V100 GPUs providing 256 GB of total VRAM.
768 GB of system memory delivering 8.0 GB of RAM per core.
32 Gbps baseline network bandwidth for high-throughput data transfer.
Zero local storage, requiring network-attached storage configurations.
Optimized for deep learning training, parallel computing, and data science.
